meta.siteTitle: Ubepari Wallet — Own your dream PC. Pay in parts.
meta.siteDescription: Tanzania's premium hire-purchase platform for PCs. Pay a deposit via M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, or card — walk out with your machine today.

footer.copyright: © {year} Ubepari PC. Built in Dar es Salaam.
footer.legalNote: Credit facility operated by Ubepari PC. Hire-purchase regulated under Tanzanian consumer-finance law.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Fastest. Your order ID gets pre-filled.

faqs.a: You pay 20% today and own the PC immediately. The balance is split over 3, 6, 9, or 12 months — paid through your Ubepari Wallet via mobile money or card.

faqs.q: What happens if I miss a payment?
faqs.a: A 2% late fee applies after 7 days. Your PC is never repossessed without written notice and a 30-day grace window.

faqs.q: Can I pay the balance off early?
faqs.a: Yes, and there's no fee for doing so. Early payoff may also unlock credit-point rewards.

faqs.q: Which payment providers work with Ubepari?
faqs.a: M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, and Visa / Mastercard — all processed through Evmark's certified gateway.

recommend.heading: Tell us who you are.
recommend.subheading: What will you do with this PC? Budget? Any brands you love or hate? Type anything — the more natural, the better the match.
recommend.placeholder: e.g. I'm a graphic designer who edits 4K video on weekends…
examples: I'm a graphic designer who edits 4K video on weekends. Budget 4M.
University student studying computer science. Need it for coding and light gaming. Under 2.5M.
I run a small accounting firm — 3 laptops for staff. Office-grade, budget 6M total.
Serious Valorant and CS2 player. Want 165Hz and RTX 4060 minimum.
recommend.matchResult: Based on your story, I recommend the {product} — the 3.5K OLED is a gift for retouching work, and the RTX 4060 handles 4K timelines without choking. Fits your budget at TZS 380K/month over 12 months.
recommend.disclaimer: Full conversational AI advisor ships with the next release. Prototype shows a static recommendation here.

hero.badge: New — Own your dream PC in 3 taps
hero.subheading: The premium way to buy a PC in Tanzania. Choose your machine, pay a deposit, and walk out with it today — everything else lives in your Ubepari Wallet.

howItWorks.heading: Three taps. That's it.
howItWorks.body: We designed Ubepari so the distance between wanting a PC and owning it is as short as possible — without making you read a contract you'll never read.

steps.title: Verify once.
steps.body: Upload your NIDA or passport. Our KYC team approves you — usually within a few hours — and you get your credit limit.

steps.title: Pick your PC.
steps.body: Browse the store or tell our AI Tech Tips what you need. Slide to see monthly plans over 3, 6, 9, or 12 months.

steps.title: Pay and own it.
steps.body: 20% deposit via M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, or card. Walk out with the PC. Pay the rest from your Wallet.

aiCta.body: "I'm a graphic designer who edits 4K video and occasionally plays Valorant with friends. Budget's around 4M." That's all it needs.

chat.userMessage: I design book covers in Photoshop and want to start freelancing video edits. Budget around 3.5M.
chat.aiPrefix: For your use case I'd go with the
chat.aiSuffix: . 3.5K OLED is a gift for retouching, and the RTX 4060 handles Premiere timelines smoothly.

topup.title: Top up your Wallet
topup.description: Add funds to pay installments, reserve a PC, or keep ahead of your schedule.
topup.mobileMoneyHint: You'll get a {provider} USSD prompt to authorize the transfer.
topup.pendingBody: Check your phone and approve the USSD prompt.

store.metaDescription: Browse Ubepari's full lineup of gaming PCs, ultrabooks, and custom towers. Filter by use case, brand, and monthly payment.
store.heading: Every PC we stock.
store.resultsSingular: {count} model available right now. Every machine ships same-day from our Dar showroom.
store.resultsPlural: {count} models available right now. Every machine ships same-day from our Dar showroom.
store.emptyBody: Try clearing a filter or two.

credit.disclaimer: Final approval depends on KYC & credit check. Early repayment is free; missed payments may incur a 2% late fee.

signin.heading: Sign in
signin.otpHint: We'll text a 6-digit code to your phone.

signup.heading: Create your account
signup.subtitle: It takes 60 seconds. You'll verify your ID later, when you checkout.
signup.tosPrefix: By continuing you agree to our

otp.heading: Check your phone
otp.smsText: Ubepari: {code} is your code. Expires in 5 min.

errors.invalidPhone: Please enter a Tanzanian phone number (e.g. 255712345678).
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Wait a minute.
errors.expired: That code expired. Request a new one.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many wrong tries. Request a new code.
errors.smsFailed: We couldn't send the SMS. Try again.

kyc.heading: Verify once. Shop forever.
kyc.body: Upload one valid ID and we'll assign you a credit limit, usually within a few hours. Ubepari's KYC team reviews every submission.
kyc.nidaHint: 20 digits. Find it on the front of your NIDA card.
kyc.workplaceHint: Helps us approve a higher credit limit.
steps: Our team matches your NIDA details to the national registry.
We run a soft credit check — no impact on your score.
You get your credit limit by SMS and email, usually within 4 hours.
kyc.submitted: Submitted. We'll let you know within a few hours.
kyc.errorMissingName: Legal first and last name are both required.
kyc.alreadyPendingBody: We've received your documents. Most reviews clear within a few hours — we'll text and email when you're approved.
kyc.alreadyApprovedBody: Your KYC is approved. Browse the store and choose your plan.

items.title: NIDA-verified
items.body: Every customer is verified through Tanzania's National ID system.

items.title: Encrypted payments
items.body: M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, and card — all via Evmark's certified gateway.

items.title: Same-day pickup
items.body: Pay your deposit and collect your PC from our Dar showroom today.

items.title: WhatsApp support
items.body: A real person on the other end. Your order ID is pre-filled.
